series_metadata.series_description: Reports created by the department annually, both written and electronic version.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office 1 year, on-site 2 years, off-site 2 years, then destroy. State Archives to review prior to disposition ; Electronic: In office 1 year, on-site 2 years, off-site 2 years, then destroy. State Archives to review prior to disposition, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
